once'};$tester=$tester[0];if([bool]$tester.Enabled){throw 'tester rule must be disabled'};$nora=@(Get-NetFirewallRule -PolicyStore ActiveStore -ErrorAction Stop|Where-Object{([string]$_.Name).ToLowerInvariant().StartsWith('noraphase2containment-') -or ([string]$_.Group).ToLowerInvariant().StartsWith('noraphase2containment-')});if($nora.Count -ne 0){throw 'Nora rules remain'};$proc=@(Get-Process terminal64,metatester64 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue);if($proc.Count -ne 0){throw 'terminal_or_tester_exists'};$stateJson=& powershell.exe -NoProfile 0){throw 'repository-owned operator state reader failed'};$state=($stateJson -join '')|ConvertFrom-Json;if($state.verdict -ne 'PASS' -or $state.active_job_count -ne 0 -or $state.pending_job_count -ne failed'};[ordered]@{verdict='PASS';profiles=$profiles;tester_rule_enabled=[bool]$tester.Enabled;nora_rule_count=$nora.Count;terminal_tester_process_count=$proc.Count;active_job_count=[int]$state.active_job_count;pending_job_count=[int]$state.pending_job_count;unresolved_prepared_job_count=[int]$state.unresolved_prepared_job_count;reconciled_historical_prepared_count=[int]$state.reconciled_historical_prepared_count;scheduled_nora_task_count=[int]$state.scheduled_nora_task_count;repository_commit='a28de6df6d6fdcb38c176fb8586f492e9aa45383'}|ConvertTo-Json postflight_verification_command: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop';$root='C:\NoraEvidence\Phase2';$deployed='C:\NoraEvidence\Phase2\frt1r2-inert-aa7ee49';$e=Join-Path $root 'containment-frt1r2-live-20260717T192223Z-cleanup.json') -Raw|ConvertFrom-Json;$profiles=@(Get-NetFirewallProfile -PolicyStore ActiveStore -ErrorAction Stop|Sort-Object Name|ForEach-Object{[ordered]@{name=[string]$_.Name;enabled=[bool]$_.Enabled}});if($profiles.Count -ne 3 -or @($profiles|Where-Object{!$_.enabled}).Count -ne 0){throw 'firewall profiles must be exactly three and all enabled'};$tester=@(Get-NetFirewallRule -Name '{AE6A1199-33B0-4109-B850-F1BB61AF0F6B}' -ErrorAction Stop);if($tester.Count -ne 1){throw 'tester rule must exist exactly once'};$tester=$tester[0];if([bool]$tester.Enabled){throw 'tester rule must be disabled'};$nora=@(Get-NetFirewallRule -PolicyStore ActiveStore -ErrorAction Stop|Where-Object{([string]$_.Name).ToLowerInvariant().StartsWith('noraphase2containment-') -or ([string]$_.Group).ToLowerInvariant().StartsWith('noraphase2containment-')});if($nora.Count -ne 0){throw 'Nora rules remain'};$proc=@(Get-Process terminal64,metatester64 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue);if($proc.Count -ne 0){throw 'terminal_or_tester_exists'};$stateJson=& powershell.exe -NoProfile -NonInteractive -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File (Join-Path $deployed 'phase2-operator-state.ps1') -Mode inventory -EvidenceRoot $root -QualificationId 'frt1r2-live-20260717T192223Z';if($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0){throw 'repository-owned operator state reader failed'};$state=($stateJson -join '')|ConvertFrom-Json;if($state.verdict -ne 'PASS' -or $state.active_job_count -ne 0 -or $state.pending_job_count -ne 0 -or $state.unresolved_prepared_job_count -ne 0 -or $state.scheduled_nora_task_count -ne 0){throw 'repository-owned normalized/reconciled postflight state failed'};$expectedAccepted=Join-Path $e 'containment-frt1r2-live-20260717T192223Z.transaction-accepted.json';$expectedFinal=Join-Path $e 'containment-frt1r2-live-20260717T192223Z.json';$expectedCleanup=Join-Path $e 'containment-frt1r2-live-20260717T192223Z-cleanup.json';if(!(Test-Path -LiteralPath $expectedAccepted -PathType Leaf) -or !(Test-Path -LiteralPath $expectedFinal -PathType Leaf) -or !(Test-Path -LiteralPath $expectedCleanup -PathType Leaf)){throw 'qualification-specific containment state unresolved'};if($cleanup.campaign_identity -ne 'frt1r2-live-20260717T192223Z' -or violation'};[ordered]@{verdict='PASS';profiles=$profiles;tester_rule_enabled=[bool]$tester.Enabled;nora_rule_count=$nora.Count;terminal_tester_process_count=$proc.Count;active_job_count=[int]$state.active_job_count;pending_job_count=[int]$state.pending_job_count;unresolved_prepared_job_count=[int]$state.unresolved_prepared_job_count;scheduled_nora_task_count=[int]$state.scheduled_nora_task_count;containment_state='resolved';unrelated_firewall_unchanged=[bool]$cleanup.unrelated_rules_unchanged;result_sha256=(Get-FileHash -LiteralPath (Join-Path $e 'qualification-result.json') -Algorithm SHA256).Hash.ToLowerInvariant()}|ConvertTo-Json -Depth 20

expected_results.second_cleanup: repository-owned cleanup must return pass with removed_rule_count=0 if run manually

manual_run_instructions: Do not continue unless every precondition passes.
Run the live qualification command exactly once.
If qualification fails or leaves a rule, run the emergency cleanup command once.
Return the complete outputs to the coordinating chat.
Never retry with the same qualification ID.

operator_state_reader.contract: repository-owned normalized/reconciled job-state and Nora scheduled-task inventory; read-only
